results.summary: paragraph 1500-B-LOOKUP-TRANTYPE in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1500-B-LOOKUP-TRANTYPE.                                                  
           READ TRANTYPE-FILE INTO TRAN-TYPE-RECORD                             
              INVALID KEY                                                       
                 DISPLAY 'INVALID TRANSACTION TYPE : '  FD-TRAN-TYPE            
                 MOVE 23 TO IO-STATUS                                           
                 PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                 
                 PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                     
           END-READ                                                             
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.preamble:

results.summary: paragraph 9300-TRANTYPE-CLOSE in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9300-TRANTYPE-CLOSE.                                                     
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           CLOSE TRANTYPE-FILE                                                  
           IF  TRANTYPE-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING TRANSACTION TYPE FILE'                    
               MOVE TRANTYPE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: STEP20
